description_long: This object is a realistic lemon wedge, featuring a thick, white pith along the curved outer edge and a translucent, pale yellow interior with visible fibrous segments. The rind is slightly glossy and uneven, with subtle textural details that mimic the natural surface of a lemon. The cut surface is moist and shiny, showing the juicy, segmented flesh typical of citrus fruits. The wedge is irregularly shaped, with one end tapering to a point and the other more rounded. The coloration transitions from a deeper yellow on the rind to a lighter, almost white hue at the pith. There are no visible stickers, labels, or blemishes on the surface.
description: A glossy, pale yellow lemon wedge with a thick white pith and juicy, fibrous interior. The rind is slightly uneven and the cut surface is moist and shiny.
description_view_0: The wedge is seen from a side angle, highlighting the thick white pith and the textured, juicy interior.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the curve of the wedge and the glossy, translucent lemon flesh.
description_view_2: The wedge appears elongated, with the fibrous interior and moist surface clearly visible.
description_view_3: A top-down view shows the full length of the wedge, with the segmented flesh and thick pith most prominent.
attribute_peel_condition: The lemon's peel appears intact, slightly uneven, and glossy, with no visible cracks or peeling.
